title: Typing
wikitext:
[]: Typing             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Sun May 03, 2009 3:14 am During the scene in EoE when the bridge bunnies get tanged, when one of the Rei's tang's Maya, what does the Rei/Ritsuko type on her laptop before they hug? Anybody ever wonder this or figure it out?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 03, 2009 3:28 am http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-m26/episode-m26-scene08B.html#cut334

[]:             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Sun May 03, 2009 4:24 am thanks i always wondered, that i have a crappy dvd player that doesnt let me slow down the time. :(

[]: Re: Typing             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed May 06, 2009 1:57 pm xtr00kvltcorex wrote: During the scene in EoE when the bridge bunnies get tanged, when one of the Rei's tang's Maya, what does the Rei/Ritsuko type on her laptop before they hug?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed May 06, 2009 3:02 pm You never cease to amaze me, PRPD.

[]:             Quote Post by Evayo » Wed May 06, 2009 9:23 pm Apparently there was an error on the animator's part during the shot where her fingers type, as she seems to be typing "I NEED YUO." It comes up correctly on the monitor, however. Just a common case of unchecked engrish in anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu May 07, 2009 2:11 am She doesn't type the "d" nor hit the spacebar. She hits the "r" instead. So it's more like INeerYuo. Close enough. EDIT: Actually, she presses the right arrow key.

[]:             Quote Post by Evayo » Thu May 07, 2009 9:28 am That's even funnier.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu May 07, 2009 9:59 am Ornette wrote: She doesn't type the "d" nor hit the spacebar. She hits the "r" instead. So it's more like INeerYuo. Close enough. EDIT: Actually, she presses the right arrow key.
